steps.title: Find the finite verb slot
steps.content: The subject is "Nery and her colleagues," and the sentence needs a main verb after the time marker "In January 2023." The verb should describe the completed action of releasing the study.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: B is a present participle, C is a perfect participial phrase, and D is an infinitive. None can serve as the finite main verb of the clause.

steps.title: Complete the past action
steps.content: Published is a finite past-tense verb that completes the independent clause. The answer is A.
